enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual vlog update from his apartment in Boulder, Colorado on January 8, 2017. He covers a failed shower repair attempt, an evening spent doing maintenance work on his personal website, and a list of upcoming tasks including selling his car, printing photos for his walls, and starting an audiobook project.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: frustrated but not panicked; willing to call maintenance and use the clubhouse shower in the meantime
enjoys the low-effort cleanup work like updating colors, numbers, and statuses
committed to listing it aggressively regardless of outcome
won't start indoor cycling training until February because there's too much website and admin work to finish first
ready to start; plans to record audio first and do the accompanying video later

transcript.text: Hello living in Boulder, vlog January 8th 2017. Yesterday I kind of started kind of slow. I went, whew, I went into the hardware store to try to fix my shower. I took this part out. I haven't been able to use the hot shower. I replaced the part.

But it didn't do anything, so I'll have to call the maintenance people tomorrow on Monday and see if they can help me figure out. I'd suck if I had to get like a plumber to fix it. I don't have much money, but at least I can take a shower at the clubhouse and my roommate isn't bothering me to fix it right away.

And then I, yeah, yesterday I was working on my website. I wanted to fix, I had these numbers, speed, watts, screwed up for a little bit on my bike racer level page for 40 kilometer. But then I realized it was only for like three levels. It was like that.

But by then I was looking at it and I figured I'd just go ahead and fix work on it. So I spent the rest of last night just working on my pages, all the, all the different ones. Um, I remembered that they were very, uh, in a state of like incompletion, basic, like, and, uh, a lot of them extremely basic, like, like just, just at the pasting stage.

And so I had to like put in, but it was super easy, like work that I had to do. It was just changing colors and numbers and the stuff. It was like total brain candy, which was fun. I liked doing that kind of work. So, and I had, and it's definitely with it.

I drew the umbrella of stuff that I need to do before I start exercising. Um, I mean, I don't, I'm not going to finish my bike racer level page or anything like that, but I definitely want to, um, you know, get it, do all the obvious stuff, service level stuff for my whole website.
Actually, I'll probably be working the rest of the month. I probably won't start riding my rollers until the beginning, until sometime in February.

Cause there's just so much stuff that you have to do. Uh, I mean, I'm definitely going to put my car up for sale and, um, aggressively try to sell that. Um, no matter what, as soon as I'm done with this.
Um, but, uh, so yeah, there was a lot of, um, I don't want to say all this stuff I needed to do on my site yesterday.
Cause I can't even remember, but I'm putting up more photos. So let's, let's post more photos on the walls.
Um, and then what else? Um, yeah, put hooks around the walls and still have to clean up my room, my floor and stuff.
Um, I'm listening to the history of England podcast. Um, yeah, I'm ready to start doing the audio book thing.
My audio book technique. We listen to an audio book a day and do the video about it later on.
As soon as I tie up all the loose ends that I'm working on right now, um, so I guess that's all I had to talk about.
